title: Senior Software Engineer - Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Zoho Corporation Holdings Services - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Senior Software Engineer at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zoho Corporation Holdings Services:
Zoho Corporation Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zoho Corporation Holdings Services!
